top.name: Spell Stitch
top.rules_text: Bind: play both halves of the next card. Top resolves then bottom immediately after.

channel.name: Spell Stitch (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Bottom half costs 0 when bound

bottom.name: Arcane Drift
bottom.rules_text: Move 1 tile per spell cast this turn (max 4). Gain 2 armor per tile moved.

channel.name: Arcane Drift (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also gain 2 shield per tile
